lsm303agr_acc_init.tooltip: Initialize LSM303AGR accelerometer sensor via I2C interface

lsm303agr_mag_init.tooltip: Initialize LSM303AGR magnetometer sensor via I2C interface

lsm303agr_acc_get_axis.tooltip: Read LSM303AGR accelerometer X/Y/Z axis acceleration value in mg

lsm303agr_mag_get_axis.tooltip: Read LSM303AGR magnetometer X/Y/Z axis magnetic field value in mGauss

lsm303agr_acc_get_temperature.tooltip: Read LSM303AGR accelerometer temperature value in °C

lsm303agr_ahrs_update.tooltip: Update attitude estimation using accelerometer and magnetometer data, computing roll, pitch and heading

lsm303agr_ahrs_get_angle.tooltip: Get attitude estimation result. Roll/Pitch range: -180~180°, Heading range: 0~360°
